response.justification: Sarah has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and broad experience across languages and architectures, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT consulting, formal project management, and UML expertise — and her German is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse tech stacks and environments
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and knowledge sharing
concerns: German proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of architectural leadership or UML modeling in client-facing consulting contexts
Lacks documented experience in IT security, compliance, or requirements management for enterprise clients
